name: Address Space Randomization
description: Verify ASLR is fully enabled to prevent buffer injection exploits.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper address space randomization settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Address Space Randomization. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `kernel.randomize_va_space=2` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "kernel.randomize_va_space=2", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-KOH-03", "cost": "LOW", "estimated_time_hours": 4}
